title: SaltyFish Vehicle [Immersive Vehicles content pack]
description: an addon pack for immersive vehicle
body:
_( I have no idea about the pack name so name it this for now )_

CurseForge Page:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saltyfish-vehicle](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saltyfish-vehicle)

Flying a widebody in minecraft? Driving a European truck in minecraft? This pack gives you a choice!  You can enjoy flying and cool truck lights with this pack!

This pack requires **Immersive Vehicles:[modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)/[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator)** to work.
IV discord channel: **[Immersive Vehicles Discord](https://discord.gg/KaaSUjm)** .
some sounds resource depends on **[OCP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transport-simulator-official-vehicle-set)** .
Truck engine sounds need **[GAP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golden-airport-pack-immersive-vehicles-content)** to play correctly yet.
For PFD you can use: **[spicy sausesaig gauge pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spicy-sausesaig-gauge-pack-iv-mts)** .
*Now the pack has updated PFD for 777 so you dont need to worry if you are on 1.16
For ground service you can use: **[AIAV](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aero-industries-airport-vehicles)** .

## Current Context: ### Boeing 777-300er with its parts and 6 paints: - Air China - Air NewZeland - ANA - British Airways - China Airline - Korean Air - United Airlines ### Airbus 340-600 with its parts and 5 paints: - Lufthansa - Etihad Airways - China Eastern - Virginatl Antic - Mahan Air ### Volvo FH16 4x2 truck - two types of cab and 5 paints and its parts All vehicles have reflection support (you need shader which supports PBR) and interactive parts, enjoy your driving Trip! ## Known issues: IV thrust vector will raise the nose of the planes easily, you can avoid it by reduce throttle when at low speed on ground yet. for GPWS please use latest IV, some sound wont be played in old versions. using paint gun for plane may freeze or crash the game ## Some Question and Anwser: Q: add passenger seats to 777 and a340?
A: will be added them after passenger cabin layout finished
Q: more airlines?
A: I will add more airline paints gradually
Q: Plan for Updating?
A: I don't have a firm update plan yet, maybe Airbus widebodies or Antonov transport aircraft, for trucks I may make Scania and Benz

**This is my first IV pack, some model parts and textures are not finished yet, don't mind~ I will complete more details and add more vehicles if I have time.**


**Thank you to all people offered help in IV/MTS community!**
